'''manopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oekist|oekist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oekist|oekist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| manopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mænepeth|mænepeth]] || [[word:mænepej|mænepej]] || [[word:mænepesh|mænepesh]] || [[word:mænepe|mænepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:manonopoth|manonopoth]] || [[word:manonopoj|manonopoj]] || [[word:manonoposh|manonoposh]] || [[word:manonopo|manonopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:manopoth|manopoth]] || [[word:manopoj|manopoj]] || [[word:manoposh|manoposh]] || [[word:manopo|manopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:manofpoth|manofpoth]] || [[word:manofpoj|manofpoj]] || [[word:manofposh|manofposh]] || [[word:manofpof|manofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:manopotho|manopotho]] || [[word:manopojo|manopojo]] || [[word:manoposho|manoposho]] || [[word:manopoko|manopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:manopoth|manopoth]] || [[word:manopoj|manopoj]] || [[word:manoposh|manoposh]] || [[word:manopo|manopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:manopothol|manopothol]] || [[word:manopojol|manopojol]] || [[word:manoposhol|manoposhol]] || [[word:manopokol|manopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:manopothotho|manopothotho]] || [[word:manopojojo|manopojojo]] || [[word:manoposhosho|manoposhosho]] || [[word:manopoko|manopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:manopothon|manopothon]] || [[word:manopojon|manopojon]] || [[word:manoposhon|manoposhon]] || [[word:manopokon|manopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:manopothoro|manopothoro]] || [[word:manopojoro|manopojoro]] || [[word:manoposhoro|manoposhoro]] || [[word:manopokoro|manopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
